name: Baby Boomers Credit repair
description_short: Performance-based credit repair company operating in San Diego with no upfront fees. Clients pay only after successful credit removals or fixes.
description_long:
Baby Boomers Credit Repair was founded by Mel Zadeh, who experienced poor credit and frustration with high upfront fees from traditional credit repair companies. After partnering with established credit repair professionals—some with over 40 years of industry experience—Zadeh launched his own firm to address what he saw as inadequate client service in the market.

The company specializes in credit dispute and repair services using a performance-based model. Their core offering includes credit repair (disputing negative items), credit enhancement through client education, and free consultation calls. They position themselves around the primary goal of helping clients improve credit scores to qualify for major purchases like homes and cars.

Their key differentiator is their "no upfront fees" model where clients only pay after each successful removal or credit fix. This performance-based structure eliminates client financial risk at the entry point and aligns company incentives with actual results. The company has received 23 "Highly Recommended" ratings on Alignable from local business owners, indicating some peer recognition.

However, the website provides limited detail on specific dispute processes, success rates, timeline expectations, or pricing structure beyond the "pay after results" claim. No information is disclosed about CFPB complaints, state licensing status, or verifiable outcome data. The company appears to be a small operation (single named owner visible) without extensive online documentation of methodology or consumer protections.
address: 16776 Bernardo Center Dr 212 E, San Diego, CA 92128

company_info.headquarters: 16776 Bernardo Center Dr 212 E, San Diego, CA 92128

pros: No upfront fees—clients only pay after successful credit item removals or fixes
Performance-based pricing model eliminates financial risk for initial consultation
Free consultation calls offered to prospective clients
Founded based on founder's personal negative experience with predatory credit repair practices
Team includes partners with 40+ years combined credit repair experience
Receives 23 'Highly Recommended' ratings from local business owners on Alignable
Offers credit education and enhancement beyond dispute services
cons: Website lacks pricing details, success rates, average timeline for disputes, or specific fee amounts after results
No disclosure of CFPB complaints, state licensing credentials, or regulatory compliance information
Limited information on dispute methodology, credit bureau relationships, or consumer protection guarantees
Single owner listed with no visible team structure or credentials provided
No documented consumer reviews, case studies, or verifiable outcome data on the website
best_for: San Diego-area consumers with negative credit items who want to avoid upfront payment risk
Baby Boomers and older adults seeking to rebuild credit for major purchases (home/auto)
Consumers skeptical of traditional credit repair due to past high-fee experiences
diagnosis: Baby Boomers Credit Repair targets San Diego consumers seeking credit repairs with zero upfront financial commitment, using a performance-based fee structure. The main caveat is that the website provides no verifiable information about success rates, specific pricing after results, licensing status, CFPB history, or dispute methodology—making it difficult to independently assess reliability or compare against alternatives.
services: Credit dispute and repair (challenging negative items on credit reports)
Performance-based payment arrangement after successful results
